message:
Add iOS WebKit optimizations and dynamic overscan tuning

Enhance CanvasSequenceGridRenderer performance on iOS Safari and other
mobile WebKit browsers:

iOS/WebKit detection:
- Add isIOSWebKit() to detect iPad/iPhone including iPadOS 13+ which
  reports as MacIntel but has touch support
- Disable scroll blit on iOS where canvas copy operations are unreliable
- Reduce maxCachedRows to 40 on iOS (vs 60 mobile, unlimited desktop)
  to manage memory pressure

Dynamic overscan tuning:
- Add overscanIdleRows (large) and overscanScrollRows (small) modes
- During active scroll: use minimal overscan (4-14 rows) to keep
  each frame cheap and prevent jank/black repaint
- When idle: expand to full overscan (12-100 rows) to pre-render
  content for smooth navigation
- Overscan targets scale with viewport height and device type

Canvas context improvements:
- Request 'desynchronized' context attribute for smoother rendering
- Fall back through three getContext() options for compatibility

These changes address scroll stuttering and blank frame flash issues
reported on iOS devices while maintaining smooth performance on desktop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
